name: Potato-Tofu Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes and slice them very thinly.
2. Place half of the sliced potatoes in the bottom of an oiled baking dish. On top of the potatoes, place half of the onion slices. Cover the onions with half of the tofu slabs, and sprinkle the tofu with 1/2 teaspoon of savory seasoning.
3. Repeat the layers and top the casserole with the bread crumbs.
4. Mix together the tahini, shoyu, and nutritional yeast. Gradually stir in the water or stock. Mix until smooth. Slowly pour the liquid mixture over the bread crumbs.
5. Bake the casserole at 350°F for 1 hour, or until the potatoes are cooked and the excess liquid has gone.
